source.name: Fry Sight Words List, first 600 words, with original WordBloc seed words retained
source.notes: Fry list membership is stored as curriculum_tags by 100-word group; Dolch membership is added where words overlap published Dolch grade bands. Original WordBloc seed entries retain their hand-authored phonics/theme/difficulty tags.

difficulty_labels.2: Elementary (blends, digraphs, and early Fry words)
difficulty_labels.3: Intermediate (vowel teams, silent letters, and Fry 201-400)
